title: juncus articulatus subsp. striatus
intro: Juncus articulatus subsp. striatus, also known as the jointed rush or striated rush, is a type of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae. The plant is recognized by its distinctive jointed stems and purple flowers. Medicinally, Juncus articulatus subsp. striatus has been used to treat various ailments, including wounds and skin conditions, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are believed to provide health benefits such as soothing digestive issues and reducing inflammation.
